name: Add a Freshdesk Contact Widget to your Webstore
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To integrate Freshdesk onto your Neto webstore, there's two parts that need to be set up:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1104-add-a-freshdesk-contact-widget-to-your-webstore#create-a-contact-us-widget-in-freshdesk", "children": [{"text": "Create a Contact Us Widget in Freshdesk"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1104-add-a-freshdesk-contact-widget-to-your-webstore#", "children": [{"text": "Add the Freshdesk Widget in Neto"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Create a Contact Us Widget in Freshdesk"}], "data-id": "create-a-contact-us-widget-in-freshdesk"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Freshdesk widgets are straight forward to create and customise to match your webstore branding. Follow the steps "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/239273-setting-up-your-help-widget", "children": [{"text": "in their help guide"}]}, {"text": " to create a contact us widget."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We recommend that you enable the captcha settings to reduce the amount of spam you receive."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaFreshdeskContactWidgettoyourWebstore1.05T5g00000twrumEAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaFreshdeskContactWidgettoyourWebstore1.05T5g00000twrumEAA.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": in the help widget "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/50000000010", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once your widget is created, copy the embed code so that it can be added into your Neto control panel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add the Freshdesk Widget in Neto"}], "data-id": "add-the-freshdesk-widget-in-neto"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To make the contact us widget appear on your webstore, you need to add a custom script:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search for "}, {"text": "Custom Scripts", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click on it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a name for your script in the "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " field (e.g. Freshdesk contact us widget)."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Scripts section, click on the "}, {"text": "Page Footer", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab. Paste the embed code from Freshdesk into the text field."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaFreshdeskContactWidgettoyourWebstore2.05T5g00000twrvGEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaFreshdeskContactWidgettoyourWebstore2.05T5g00000twrvGEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 236}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. You'll be prompted to send a verification token to your email address."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "When you receive the email, copy the security token into your control panel and click the "}, {"text": "Verify Token", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaFreshdeskContactWidgettoyourWebstore3.05T5g00000twrw4EAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaFreshdeskContactWidgettoyourWebstore3.05T5g00000twrw4EAA.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 281}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your custom script will be saved, and your Freshdesk widget will appear on your webstore."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaFreshdeskContactWidgettoyourWebstore4.05T5g00000twrwYEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaFreshdeskContactWidgettoyourWebstore4.05T5g00000twrwYEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image4", "width": 700, "height": 230}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
